ogTitle: Upper Lockyer vs Upper Mount Gravatt: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Lockyer and Upper Mount Gravatt.
heading: Upper Lockyer vs Upper Mount Gravatt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Lockyer, Queensland and Upper Mount Gravatt, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Lockyer has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upper Mount Gravatt (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Lockyer or Upper Mount Gravatt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Lockyer has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Upper Mount Gravatt scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Lockyer scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Mount Gravatt scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Lockyer or Upper Mount Gravatt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Lockyer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
